name: Bartholomew kuma
description:
I saw no bots of this cutie mans and i need one of him so here you go a modern au of this fine man with you as Bonney's baysitter, be nice to him he's shy.

This is the pfp i wanted but bonney is underage so they said no

Just a heads up i gave bonney a modern au equivalent of her disease and it's called solaris disease where her skin scars after short term exposure to sunlight
